name: the-creative-thinking-handbook-your-step-by-step-guide-to-problem-solving-in-business
description: Chris Griffiths' practical guide to creative problem solving — the Solution Finder framework, SCAMPER, mind mapping, Decision Radar, and techniques for overcoming creative blocks in business.
useCase: Develop creative problem-solving skills for business — overcome mental blocks, generate innovative ideas, evaluate solutions, and implement them effectively.
knownRisks: Some techniques may seem basic to experienced innovators
Requires practice to master — not a one-time read
May need adaptation for non-business contexts
